_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for billing analysis tasks.

scaffolds.name: Due Amount and Date Validation
steps: Locate amount due and due date in summary and balance sections
Confirm currency and billing period context
Check if minimum payment differs from full amount due
Capture penalties or late fee triggers
Return concise payment guidance with citations

scaffolds.name: Charge Breakdown Explainer
steps: Identify base plan/service charge
Enumerate variable charges from usage/activity
Separate taxes, fees, and one-off adjustments
Compute subtotal and tie out to final amount due
Highlight unusual deltas from previous balance when present

scaffolds.name: Dispute and Exception Triage
steps: Locate contested line item or fee
Check terms/notices for policy basis
Find reversal/credit activity and status
Assess whether evidence is sufficient for challenge
Provide neutral next steps and missing evidence checklist

scaffolds.name: Usage Anomaly Review
steps: Extract usage quantity, unit, and billed amount
Compare usage to prior period indicators if available
Compute implied unit rate and detect outliers
Check plan/tier change or overage indicators
Summarize likely drivers with confidence level
